title: Michael Manley
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Otheruses|Michael}}
{{Image|person}}
'''Michael Manley''', also known as '''Mike Manley''', is an artist who illustrated two of the ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' supplements, as well as ''[[Lightsaber Dueling Pack]]''. He also composed the sketches for ''[[Tales of the Bounty Hunters]]''; and along with [[Al Williamson]] and [[Aaron McClellan]], he provided the sketches for ''[[Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina]]'' and ''[[Tales from Jabba's Palace]]''.
